title: Cruise season sets sail with arrival of Swan Hellenic Diana
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay’s 2025/26 cruise season officially gets under way today with the arrival of the luxury cruise ship, Swan Hellenic Diana.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay’s 2025/26 cruise season officially gets under way today with the arrival of the luxury cruise ship, Swan Hellenic Diana."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Diana is expected to dock directly at the Mossel Bay Harbour at about 07:00, allowing passengers to disembark straight onto shore."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ship is scheduled to depart again at 18:00.","html":"The ship is scheduled to depart again at 18:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The vessel will bring about 167 passengers. Of these, about 92 have booked excursions in and around the region, while roughly 75 are expected to spend the day exploring the town on foot - visiting local shops, restaurants and attractions.","html":"The vessel will bring about 167 passengers. Of these, about 92 have booked excursions in and around the region, while roughly 75 are expected to spend the day exploring the town on foot - visiting local shops, restaurants and attractions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Cruise season sets sail with arrival of Swan Hellenic Diana
